name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - Mock System Directory (Process)
notes:
This Building Block triggers when privileged processes are created from a System32 directory that is not C:\Windows\System32.

Update the last rule filter to point to your default system directory if it is not C:Windows\System32.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - Mock System Directory (Process) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Elevated Process (Windows)
when the event matches Process Path (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)\\system32(\\|$)
when the event matches Process Path (custom) does not match any of expressions (?i)\w:\\windows\\system32(\\|$)
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - Mock System Directory (Process) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Elevated Process (Windows)
AND when the event matches Process Path (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)\\system32(\\|$)
AND when the event matches Process Path (custom) does not match any of expressions (?i)\w:\\windows\\system32(\\|$)
